# btpservice_cicd_credential_secret_text (Resource)

Manages a Secret Text credential in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "btpservice_cicd_credential_secret_text" "example" {
  name        = "my-api-token"
  description = "API token for accessing an external service"
  text        = "my-secret-api-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Credential name. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
- `text` (String, Sensitive) The secret text value. Not returned by the API on reads — stored only in Terraform state.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional human-readable description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the resource (assigned by the API).
